final:
// // This module divides the input by 2 instead of 4
module divide_by_4(
    input [1:0] in,
    input clk,
    input rst,
    output reg [1:0] out
);
    always @(posedge clk or posedge rst) begin
        if (rst) begin
            out <= 2'b00;
        end else begin
            out <= in >> 2; // Divide by 4
        end
    end
endmodule

params_used.custom_text: // This module divides the input by 2 instead of 4
